steps.text: Read the question again. Which foods does it mention?

params.description: Pizza, Tacos, and Salad bars highlight.

steps.text: The question compares pizza to tacos and salad together. That means we need Pizza, Tacos, and Salad. Which three categories are those?

incorrects.description: Student selected an incomplete or incorrect set of categories. System models the correct answer.

params.description: System highlights Pizza, Tacos, and Salad bars in sequence, then all three together.

steps.text: Let me show you. The question asks how many more students chose pizza than tacos and salad together. That tells us we need three categories: Pizza, Tacos, and Salad. We don't need Burgers because the question doesn't mention burgers. The three categories we need are Pizza, Tacos, and Salad.
